title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMHighway
description: A road or path element from OpenStreetMap tagged with the highway key. Represents all types of roads, from motorways to footpaths, as defined by the OSM highway taxonomy.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMHighway

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

highwayType.description: Property. The OSM highway tag value that classifies the type of road or path. Enum:'motorway, trunk, primary, secondary, tertiary, unclassified, residential, service, living_street, pedestrian, track, footway, cycleway, path, motorway_link, trunk_link, primary_link, secondary_link, tertiary_link, road, busway, bus_guideway, construction, proposed'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:highway'

ref.description: Property. Official road reference number or code (e.g. A-3, M-30). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

maxSpeed.description: Property. Maximum permitted speed in kilometres per hour. Units:'Km/h'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:maxspeed'

lanes.description: Property. Total number of traffic lanes in both directions. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lanes'

oneway.description: Property. Indicates whether the road is one-way for motor vehicles. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:oneway'

surface.description: Property. Physical surface material of the road. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:surface'

access.description: Property. General access restriction for the road. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

bridge.description: Property. Indicates whether this road segment runs over a bridge. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:bridge'

tunnel.description: Property. Indicates whether this road segment runs through a tunnel. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:tunnel'

layer.description: Property. Vertical layer relative to other features at the same location, used to indicate overlapping ways. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:layer'

lit.description: Property. Indicates whether the road is illuminated by street lighting. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lit'

operator.description: Property. Name of the entity responsible for the operation or maintenance of this road. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

widthMeters.description: Property. Physical width of the road in metres. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:width'

cyclewayPresent.description: Property. Indicates whether a dedicated cycle lane is present alongside this road. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:cycleway'

sidewalk.description: Property. Indicates the presence and side of a sidewalk alongside the road. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:sidewalk'

inclinePercent.description: Property. Slope of the road expressed as a percentage. Positive values indicate uphill. Units:'%'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:incline'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item (e.g. Wikidata, Wikipedia).
